Naafiri.trading_pattern: Naafiri has early burst and mobility. Respect her all-in threat and farm safely.
Naafiri.ability_to_dodge: Naafiri Q (Darkin Salvo) — step to the side or back away.
Naafiri.early_game: Play defensively. Naafiri has strong early all-in potential.
Naafiri.mid_game: Use ult for picks on isolated targets. Space in fights.
Naafiri.late_game: Both scale. Teamfight positioning matters most.
Naafiri.win_condition: Survive early, make picks with ult. Win through teamfight coordination.
Naafiri.scaling: Even — both scale at similar rates
Naafiri.positioning: Keep distance with E poke. Never walk into her all-in range.

Aurelion Sol.trading_pattern: Aurelion Sol has superior waveclear and roam threat. Farm safely and respect his scaling.
Aurelion Sol.ability_to_dodge: Aurelion Sol W (Celestial Expansion) — stay at range or back off.
Aurelion Sol.early_game: Farm defensively. Aurelion Sol pushes faster and roams better.
Aurelion Sol.mid_game: Use ult for picks. Aurelion Sol controls mid lane better.
Aurelion Sol.late_game: He outscales in teamfights. Win through picks and objective control.
Aurelion Sol.win_condition: Make picks with ult before he roams. Win through macro pressure.
Aurelion Sol.scaling: Aurelion Sol outscales — his teamfight control and roam impact is superior
Aurelion Sol.positioning: Keep distance with E poke. Use ult for picks on roamers.

Vel'Koz.trading_pattern: Vel'Koz outranges you. Space carefully and farm defensively.
Vel'Koz.ability_to_dodge: Vel'Koz E (Tractor Beam) — dodge by stepping away or to the side.
Vel'Koz.early_game: Farm defensively. His range advantage is overwhelming.
Vel'Koz.mid_game: Both scale into poke wars. Space properly.
Vel'Koz.late_game: He outscales in sustained damage. Use ult for picks.
Vel'Koz.win_condition: Make picks with ult. Win through teamfight coordination.
Vel'Koz.scaling: Vel'Koz outscales — his sustained poke is overwhelming
Vel'Koz.positioning: Keep maximum distance. Use minions for cover.

Mel.trading_pattern: Mel reflects projectile damage. Use E carefully and respect her reflect defense.
Mel.ability_to_dodge: Mel E (Reflect) — your E reflects back, so be strategic with casts.
Mel.early_game: Farm defensively. Mel's reflect punishes your poke.
Mel.mid_game: Use ult selectively to avoid wasting damage. Space properly.
Mel.late_game: She outscales with her reflect defense. Make picks before teamfights.
Mel.win_condition: Make picks with ult before teamfights. Win through macro pressure.
Mel.scaling: Mel slightly favored — her reflect becomes more valuable late
Mel.positioning: Use E cautiously to avoid reflect penalty. Keep distance.

Fizz.trading_pattern: Fizz is melee with burst. Keep maximum distance and farm safely.
Fizz.ability_to_dodge: Fizz R (Chum the Waters) — move perpendicular or away from shark.
Fizz.early_game: Play very defensively. Fizz has strong all-in potential.
Fizz.mid_game: Use ult to protect yourself from his engages. Space in fights.
Fizz.late_game: Both scale. Teamfight positioning determines winner.
Fizz.win_condition: Survive early, make picks with ult. Win through teamfight coordination.
Fizz.scaling: Even — both scale at similar rates
Fizz.positioning: Keep maximum distance. Use ult defensively against his engage.

Wukong.trading_pattern: Wukong has early mobility and tankiness. Keep distance and farm safely.
Wukong.ability_to_dodge: Wukong E (Nimble Strike) — step back when he dashes toward you.
Wukong.early_game: Play defensively. Wukong has strong early skirmish potential.
Wukong.mid_game: Use ult to protect from his engage. Space properly.
Wukong.late_game: Both scale. Teamfight positioning matters most.
Wukong.win_condition: Survive early, make picks with ult. Win through teamfight coordination.
Wukong.scaling: Even — both scale at similar rates
Wukong.positioning: Keep distance with E poke. Use ult defensively.

Vladimir.trading_pattern: Vladimir is weak early but sustains well. Respect his scaling and farm safely.
Vladimir.ability_to_dodge: Vladimir Q (Transfusion) — stay out of his short range.
Vladimir.early_game: You have early advantage with poke. Don't let him get fed.
Vladimir.mid_game: Both scale into teamfights. Make picks when possible.
Vladimir.late_game: He outscales in sustained teamfights. Use ult for picks.
Vladimir.win_condition: Get an early advantage, make picks with ult. Finish before he scales.
Vladimir.scaling: Vladimir outscales — his teamfight sustain is overwhelming
Vladimir.positioning: Use E to poke. Keep distance from his Q range.

Nasus.trading_pattern: Nasus stacks damage. Abuse him early with E poke before he scales.
Nasus.ability_to_dodge: Nasus W (Wither) — dodge by moving away or stepping back.
Nasus.early_game: Abuse him with constant E poke. Prevent his scaling.
Nasus.mid_game: Continue poking. Make picks before he becomes unkillable.
Nasus.late_game: He outscales significantly. Finish before his stacks make him unkillable.
Nasus.win_condition: Get an early lead through poke. Finish before Nasus scales.
Nasus.scaling: Nasus significantly outscales — you need a major early lead
Nasus.positioning: Use E to constantly poke from range. Never walk into his all-in.

Smolder.trading_pattern: Smolder is weak early. Use E to farm and poke freely.
Smolder.ability_to_dodge: Smolder Q (Breath) — dodge by stepping back.
Smolder.early_game: Completely dominate with E poke. Farm freely.
Smolder.mid_game: Maintain pressure. Don't let him scale.
Smolder.late_game: He outscales significantly. Finish before he gets 2-3 items.
Smolder.win_condition: Get an early lead and snowball. Finish before Smolder scales.
Smolder.scaling: Smolder significantly outscales — you need a major lead
Smolder.positioning: Use E to constantly poke. Push him off farm.

Azir.trading_pattern: Azir is weak early. Use E to farm and poke freely.
Azir.ability_to_dodge: Azir soldiers have limited early range; spam E into them.
Azir.early_game: Dominate early with E poke. Azir struggles early.
Azir.mid_game: Maintain pressure. Don't let him free-farm.
Azir.late_game: He outscales in teamfights. Finish before his control becomes oppressive.
Azir.win_condition: Get an early lead and snowball. Finish before Azir scales.
Azir.scaling: Azir outscales — his teamfight control improves late
Azir.positioning: Use E to constantly poke. Maintain mid lane control.

Yone.trading_pattern: Yone is weak early to ranged poke. Use E to spam him out.
Yone.ability_to_dodge: Yone E (Soul Unbound) — abuse the cooldown when he returns.
Yone.early_game: Dominate with E poke. Yone is weak to ranged harassment.
Yone.mid_game: Maintain pressure. Make picks with ult.
Yone.late_game: He outscales with itemization. Finish before he gets tanky.
Yone.win_condition: Get an early lead through poke. Finish before Yone scales.
Yone.scaling: Yone outscales — his itemization and scaling are superior
Yone.positioning: Use E to constantly poke from range. Maintain distance.

Galio.trading_pattern: Galio is melee. Use E to farm and poke from range freely.
Galio.ability_to_dodge: Galio W (Shield) — respect his tankiness but spam E.
Galio.early_game: Dominate with E poke. Galio is weak to ranged harassment.
Galio.mid_game: Maintain pressure. Use ult for picks.
Galio.late_game: He becomes tanky. Finish before his tankiness becomes oppressive.
Galio.win_condition: Get an early lead through poke. Finish before Galio scales.
Galio.scaling: Galio outscales — his tankiness increases late
Galio.positioning: Use E to constantly poke from range. Maintain distance.

Taliyah.trading_pattern: Taliyah has strong waveclear. Farm when her abilities are down.
Taliyah.ability_to_dodge: Taliyah Q (Threaded Volley) — dodge by moving perpendicular.
Taliyah.mid_game: Both have roam potential. Make picks with ult.
Taliyah.late_game: Both scale. Teamfight positioning determines winner.
Taliyah.win_condition: Make picks with ult. Win through objective control.
Taliyah.scaling: Taliyah slightly favored — her roaming is stronger
Taliyah.positioning: Farm safely. Use E poke when safe.

Cassiopeia.early_game: Cassio has early poke advantage. Farm defensively.
Cassiopeia.mid_game: Both scale into poke wars. Make picks with ult.
Cassiopeia.late_game: She outscales in sustained teamfights. Use ult for picks.
Cassiopeia.win_condition: Make picks with ult. Win through objective control.
Cassiopeia.scaling: Cassiopeia outscales — her sustained damage is overwhelming
Cassiopeia.positioning: Keep distance and use E poke. Avoid her poison zones.

Ryze.early_game: Ryze has early poke. Farm defensively.
Ryze.mid_game: Both scale. Make picks with ult.
Ryze.late_game: He outscales in sustained teamfights. Use ult for picks.
Ryze.win_condition: Make picks with ult. Finish before he scales.

Seraphine.early_game: Mirror her playstyle. Both have similar early game.
Seraphine.mid_game: Both scale. Make picks with ult.
Seraphine.late_game: Both scale similarly. Teamfight positioning determines winner.
Seraphine.win_condition: Make picks with ult. Win through teamfight coordination.
Seraphine.scaling: Seraphine slightly favored — her teamfight utility is marginally better
Seraphine.positioning: Use E poke to maintain distance. Avoid her poke zones.

Orianna.early_game: Mirror her playstyle. Both have similar early game.
Orianna.mid_game: Both scale. Make picks with ult.
Orianna.late_game: She outscales slightly in teamfights. Use ult for picks.
Orianna.win_condition: Make picks with ult. Win through objective control.
Orianna.scaling: Orianna slightly favored — her teamfight control is superior
Orianna.positioning: Use E poke to maintain distance. Keep distance from her ball.

Zed.trading_pattern: Zed has mobility and burst damage. Keep distance and poke with E.
Zed.ability_to_dodge: Zed W (Living Shadow) — back off when he clones to close range.
Zed.early_game: Play defensively. Zed has strong early all-in.
Zed.mid_game: Use ult for picks and poke with E. Space from his shadows.
Zed.late_game: Both scale. Teamfight positioning determines winner.
Zed.win_condition: Make picks with ult before he gets leads. Farm safely early.
Zed.scaling: Even — both scale at similar rates
Zed.positioning: Keep maximum distance. Never walk into his shadow range.
